name: session-wrap
description: Summarize and save session notes on shutdown
prompt:
This session is ending. Write a brief session summary:
1. What was accomplished (2-3 bullets)
2. Key decisions made (if any)
3. What's unfinished / next steps

Save to Engram with title 'Session wrap {date}' and type 'learning'. If Engram is unavailable, write to ~/.pi/routines/logs/session-{date}-{time}.md instead.

Keep it under 200 words.
